economic_notes: Nation operates a store (confectionary and tobacco inventory). Received $1,923,166 in COVID-19 additional funding from ISC and other sources in 2022 (2021: $1,247,322). Duncan's Carmon Creek Community Trust consolidated. Significant resource revenue from federal trust funds.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022. Consolidated entity includes Duncan's Carmon Creek Community Trust. Demand loan of $1,182,107 classified separately from long-term debt; current_liabilities includes accounts payable $1,087,008 and demand loan $1,182,107. Total government transfers calculated as WCTC $4,723,196 + ISC Health $2,015,708 + FNDF $277,920 + GoA $197,967 + CMHC $27,407 = $7,241,198 (note: Resource revenue from federal trust funds $207,273 treated as OSR as it flows through trust). Wages and benefits - Chief and Council $282,897 reported separately from general wages $1,845,591; expenses_salaries_total combines both. No schedule of remuneration with individual ranges provided. Segmented other revenue in consolidated totals ($2,140,242) differs from statement of operations other income ($1,932,969) due to internal transfers shown in segments. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers.
